steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage’s key signal is the contrast highlighted by ‘scholarly institutions considered his collection to be worthless—indeed… it wasn’t until 1968… that Oxford’s library acquired it.’ The example sets up a shift between initial dismissal and later recognition.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice D captures the pre-and-post shift in scholarly perception of ephemera, reflecting the passage’s dual focus: pre-1968 dismissal and post-1968 value recognition. A, B, and C each ignore or reverse the timeline/relationship. That matches choice D — D is correct.
